allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; spec=json.load\(sys.stdin\); paths=[\(p,m\) for p in spec['paths'] for m in spec['paths'][p] if 'user' in p.lower\(\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{m.upper\(\)} {p}' for p,m in paths\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X DELETE http://localhost:8000/api/v1/users/test123 -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}')

Bash(curl -s -X DELETE "http://localhost:8000/api/v1/users/%E7%A8%8B%E7%BD%97%E6%B6%A6" -H "Authorization: Bearer $\(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}')
